aiPulse.title: AI Pulse
aiPulse.subtitle: See what's new across the AI assistant landscape
landing.hero.title: Turn weekly work logs into promotion-ready self-appraisals
landing.hero.subtitle: Impactly AI captures what you accomplish every week and turns it into compelling, evidence-backed performance narratives — automatically. Private, secure, and free.
landing.proof.title: Trusted by engineers, designers, and PMs at companies
landing.features.title: Everything you need to never stare at a blank appraisal again
landing.features.subtitle: Built for the way modern teams actually work
landing.features.starDesc: Every appraisal comes out in the Situation, Task, Action, Result format managers expect — no rewriting required.
landing.features.critiqueDesc: Paste your draft, get line-level feedback on impact, specificity, and tone — like a coach in your corner.
landing.features.valuesDesc: Tag your wins to your company's stated values and the AI weaves them into the language your org already uses.
landing.features.okrTitle: Connect your work to company goals
landing.features.okrDesc: Connect weekly work to quarterly objectives so your review shows progress, not just activity.
landing.features.toneDesc: Confident, modest, direct, or professional — match the voice that's actually authentic to you.
landing.features.remindersDesc: A 9 AM Monday nudge so you never forget to log — quiet, easy to skip, easy to tune.
landing.howItWorks.title: Three steps from work logged to promotion earned
landing.howItWorks.step1Desc: Quick prompts pull out what you shipped, what blocked you, and what you learned — no essay required.
landing.howItWorks.step2Desc: Pick a date range and tone. The AI weaves your weeks into a coherent, evidence-backed narrative.
landing.howItWorks.step3Desc: Get line-level AI feedback, regenerate, copy, or download as Markdown — ready to paste into any HR system.
landing.privacy.title: Your work is yours. We take that seriously.
landing.privacy.principle1: Row-level security isolates your data — only you can see your logs.
landing.privacy.principle2: Your data is never used to train any AI model, including ours.
landing.privacy.principle3: Encrypted in transit and at rest, with full export and delete at any time.
landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
landing.faq.a1: Yes. The current feature set is free while we're in early access. We'll add a paid plan later for teams and HR integrations, but the personal log-and-appraise flow will always have a free tier.
landing.faq.a2: Your logs and appraisals are isolated at the database level using Supabase row-level security, encrypted in transit and at rest, and never used to train AI models. You can export or delete your data at any time from Settings.
landing.faq.q3: Will the AI sound like me or like a robot?
landing.faq.a3: The output is grounded in the specific things you logged, in your own phrasing. You can pick the tone (professional, confident, modest, direct) and regenerate until it sounds right.
landing.faq.q4: Can I import old work logs?
landing.faq.a4: Not yet — but you can backfill weeks manually. The dashboard has a 'Catch Up Needed' view that highlights missing weeks in the past 3 months so it's easy to fill the gaps.
landing.faq.q5: Does this integrate with my performance review tool?
landing.faq.a5: You can download the output as Markdown and paste it into Lattice, Culture Amp, Workday, Rippling, or any other tool. Direct integrations are on the roadmap.
landing.faq.a6: Impactly AI works in 20+ languages out of the box — English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Polish, Russian, Turkish, Arabic, Hebrew, Hindi, Bengali, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Thai, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese. The AI generates appraisals in your language automatically.
landing.finalCta.title: Ready to never write a self-appraisal from scratch again?
landing.finalCta.subtitle: Start logging in 2 minutes. Cancel anytime — there's nothing to cancel.

landing.pain.title: Built for the pain you've actually felt
landing.pain.subtitle: You know the feeling. You sit down two weeks before review and… blank.
landing.pain.r1old: Dig through Slack, Notion, Git, and your memory
landing.pain.r1new: Every win is already captured in 5-minute weekly logs
landing.pain.r2old: Panic-write your appraisal the night before
landing.pain.r2new: AI drafts it in seconds from your own words
landing.pain.r4new: Line-level critique on specificity, impact, and tone
landing.pain.r5new: Searchable, dated, exportable record of every week
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Impactly AI collects, uses, and protects your information.
privacy.section1Body: We collect the information you provide directly: your email address, the work logs you create, the criteria you define, and the AI-generated appraisals. We also collect basic technical information such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited for security and analytics.
privacy.section2Body: Your information is used solely to provide the service: storing your logs, generating appraisals on your request, sending you reminder emails if you've opted in, and improving product reliability. We do not sell your data. We do not use your logs to train any AI model.
privacy.section3Body: Your data is stored in Supabase (Postgres) with row-level security enabled. Each row is scoped to your authenticated user ID, meaning only you can read or write your data. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest.
privacy.section4Body: When you generate an appraisal or chat with the AI coach, your logs are sent to Mistral AI to produce a response. We do not share your data with any other third party. Mistral's API is used under their data processing terms; they do not retain or train on your data.
privacy.section5Body: You can export all of your data from Settings at any time, and you can delete your account, which permanently removes all of your data. You can also request a copy of everything we hold by emailing the address in the footer.
privacy.section6Body: We use a single first-party cookie for authentication. We use PostHog for product analytics, which is fully anonymized and can be disabled by contacting us.
privacy.section7Body: If we make material changes, we'll email you and update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after a change indicates acceptance.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Impactly AI, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.section1Body: Impactly AI provides tools to log your work, generate self-appraisals, and chat with an AI career coach. The service is provided as-is, with no warranty of fitness for any particular purpose.
terms.section2Body: You're responsible for keeping your login credentials secure. You're responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter. You're responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before using it in a real performance review.
terms.section3Body: Don't use the service to harass others, to generate content that's illegal in your jurisdiction, or to attempt to break or abuse the service. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms.
terms.section4Body: AI-generated appraisals and chat responses are suggestions, not facts. Always review output before submitting it as your own work. We don't guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or appropriateness of any AI output.
terms.section5Body: You own the content you create. We retain rights to the platform, the design, and the AI tooling. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process your content as needed to provide the service.
terms.section6Body: You can delete your account at any time from Settings. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or that have been inactive for more than 24 months.
terms.section7Body: The service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, our liability is limited to the amount you've paid us in the past 12 months (which, for the free tier, is zero).
terms.section8Body: If we make material changes, we'll email you. Continued use of the service after a change indicates acceptance. If you don't accept the new terms, you can delete your account.
aiPulse.hub.title: AI Pulse Hub
aiPulse.hub.subtitle: Your daily destination for AI trends, breakthroughs, and industry impact
aiPulse.hub.shareSubtitle: Stay updated with the latest AI breakthroughs and trends
aiPulse.hub.ctaTitle: How AI Trends Impact Your Work
aiPulse.hub.ctaBody: These industry shifts directly affect your team's productivity, skill requirements, and career trajectory. Track your own work outcomes and measure the impact of AI adoption in your organization.

landing.widget.title: Interactive Playground
landing.widget.heading: Try the AI Appraisal Generator
landing.widget.desc: Select your role, pick a communication tone, and see how simple bullet points turn into high-impact self-appraisals.
landing.widget.placeholder: What did you work on this week?
landing.widget.loadingMsg: Structuring logs into STAR narrative, mapping company values...
landing.widget.workspaceDesc: Click the generate button to transform your raw bullet accomplishments into a promotion-ready narrative.
landing.widget.unlockDesc: Export STAR reviews, career reflections, and AI chat critiques.
landing.painGrid.p1Title: Staring at a Blank Appraisal Box
landing.painGrid.p1Desc: Paralysis sets in as you struggle to recall what you accomplished 6 months ago, leading to generic and underplayed self-reviews.
landing.painGrid.p2Desc: Wasting hours scrolling through hundreds of Slack channels, git logs, and calendar items on December 15th to find raw proof.
landing.painGrid.p3Desc: Only remembering the tasks completed in the last 2 weeks, while major achievements from Q1 and Q2 are completely forgotten.
landing.painGrid.p4Desc: Writing a modest appraisal because you lack structural data, letting others who write assertive reviews secure the raises.
landing.painGrid.s1Desc: A safe, private weekly archive of your accomplishments, challenges, and learnings. Organized automatically as you go.
landing.painGrid.s2Desc: Multi-model semantic engines instantly compile a full-length, structured self-appraisal mapped directly to your goals in 5 seconds.
landing.painGrid.s3Desc: Add your company's core values and target OKRs, and the AI weaves them flawlessly into your appraisal paragraphs.
landing.painGrid.s4Desc: Submit a highly professional, data-backed review outlining the exact value you generated. Secure the recognition you earned.
landing.pricing.title: Simple pricing that grows with you
landing.pricing.subtitle: Start free as an individual. Bring your whole team when you're ready.
landing.pricing.freeFeature1: Weekly work logging with guided prompts
landing.pricing.freeFeature3: AI critique assistant — line-level feedback on impact, specificity and tone
landing.pricing.freeFeature10: Private by default — row-level security, data never used to train any AI model
